channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: MAGA Supporters Criticize Reason Magazine Over Its Coverage of Tulsi Gabbard’s Biolab Claims
item.description: A dispute erupted within conservative and right-wing circles after libertarian magazine Reason published an article criticizing outgoing Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard and her recent ...

item.title: Expert Warns Lebanon Dispute Could Complicate U.S.-Iran Peace Negotiations

item.title: Jim Acosta Speculates About Possible Early End to Trump's Presidency During Interview With John Harwood
item.description: A Raw Story article reports on comments made by former CNN anchor Jim Acosta during an interview with journalist John Harwood published by Zeteo. In the discussion, Harwood asked Acosta whether he bel...

item.title: Nancy Mace Proposes Bill to Ban Federal Funding for Research Aimed at Altering Animal Biological Sex
item.description: Former U.S. Representative Nancy Mace of South Carolina announced plans to introduce legislation called the 'TRANS MICE Act,' which would prohibit federal funding for research intended to alter an ani...

item.title: Singer Sombr Reportedly Invited to Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s July Wedding Celebration Event
item.description: According to TMZ, singer Sombr has reportedly been invited to attend a major wedding celebration connected to Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce. The outlet cites sources familiar with the guest list who s...

item.title: US, Iran, Pakistan and Qatar Hold High-Level Burgenstock Talks to Advance Peace Agreement and Regional Stability
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif, US Vice President JD Vance and Qatari Prime Minister Sheikh Mohammed bin Abdulrahman bin Jassim Al Thani addressed a summit in Burgenstock, Switzerland, ahead of crucial...

item.title: Tarik Skubal and White Sox Pitcher Mike Vasil Involved in Dugout Verbal Exchange During Tigers Victory
item.description: Detroit Tigers ace Tarik Skubal displayed intense emotion throughout Detroit’s 4-2 victory over the Chicago White Sox. Returning from arthroscopic elbow surgery performed on May 6, Skubal made his sec...

item.title: Brian Karem Criticizes Trump's Defense of ICE and Cites Controversial Minneapolis Shootings
item.description: The article reports on a public dispute between President Donald Trump and veteran White House correspondent Brian Karem regarding the role and conduct of U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE...

item.title: Bafana Bafana intensify preparations ahead of crucial World Cup group match against South Korea
item.description: Bafana Bafana have returned to their base in Pachuca, Mexico, where preparations have intensified for their important FIFA World Cup 2026 Group A fixture against South Korea. The match, scheduled for ...

item.title: PIP Claimants Must Report Extended Overseas Travel to Avoid Benefit Disruptions
item.description: The article warns recipients of Personal Independence Payment (PIP) in the United Kingdom about the importance of informing the Department for Work and Pensions (DWP) when traveling abroad for extende...

item.title: Seven Women Workers Die and Dozens Hospitalised After Ammonia Leak at Seafood Export Factory in Tamil Nadu
item.description: Seven women workers lost their lives and more than 67 others were hospitalised after an ammonia gas leak at a private seafood export facility near Periyapalayam in Tamil Nadu's Tiruvallur district on ...

item.title: Critics Question Trump's Reflecting Pool Vandalism Claims and Call for Evidence
item.description: A debate erupted after President Donald Trump claimed that multiple individuals had been arrested for allegedly vandalizing the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool in Washington, D.C. According to Trump'...

item.title: Japan secure dominant 4-0 victory over Tunisia to boost World Cup hopes
item.description: Japan produced an impressive performance to defeat Tunisia 4-0 in their Group F FIFA World Cup 2026 clash, a historic fixture that marked the 1,000th match in World Cup history. Hajime Moriyasu’s side...

item.title: James Carville Urges Trump Administration Staff to Leak Information to Protect Their Reputations
item.description: Democratic strategist James Carville used a recent episode of his Politics War Room podcast to encourage members of President Donald Trump's administration to leak information about internal White Hou...

item.title: Opinion Writer Criticizes JD Vance's Role in Iran Negotiations and Questions His Diplomatic Experience
item.description: This opinion article by John Casey argues that Vice President JD Vance is poorly suited to lead negotiations with Iran and criticizes both his diplomatic experience and public comments regarding the t...

item.title: US, Iran, Pakistan and Qatar Delegations Convene in Switzerland for Technical Talks on Implementing Islamabad MoU
item.description: Delegations from Iran, the United States, Pakistan and Qatar gathered in Burgenstock, Switzerland, for technical-level discussions aimed at implementing the Islamabad Memorandum of Understanding (MoU)...

item.title: Anna Maria Ferrero: Italian Actress of the 1950s and 1960s Known for Elegant Roles
item.description: Anna Maria Ferrero (1934–2018) was a talented Italian actress who captivated audiences with her delicate and refined presence during the golden age of postwar European cinema. Born in Italy, she rose ...

item.title: Mashatile urges South Africans to uphold Charlotte Maxeke’s legacy of education, service and unity
item.description: Deputy President Paul Mashatile paid tribute to struggle icon Charlotte Maxeke during the 125th graduation anniversary lecture held in Pretoria and hosted by the Charlotte Mannya-Maxeke Institute. Spe...

item.title: Faith Aid Kenya Expands Mustard Seed House to Support More Tenwek Hospital Patients and Caregivers
item.description: Patients and caregivers seeking specialised treatment at AGC Tenwek Hospital in Bomet County are set to benefit from expanded accommodation services after Faith Aid Kenya increased the capacity of its...

item.title: Swedish World Cup Supporter Highlights Buc-ee’s Experience During Tournament Visit to Texas
item.description: A Swedish soccer fan attending the 2026 FIFA World Cup in Houston became an unexpected social media sensation after enthusiastically praising Buc-ee’s, the popular Texas-based travel center chain. Dur...
